step_1_image_prompt: An overhead flat-lay shot on a polished warm-toned wood gym floor with subtle visible grain. At the upper-left of the composition, a camel-colored leather small duffel bag sits slightly tilted with contents partially spilling out toward the center. Around the bag, neatly arranged in a relaxed asymmetric lineup: a folded white gym towel at the center, a stainless steel water bottle to the upper-right, a white AirPods Pro case at the mid-right, a pair of white gym socks rolled together at the lower-left, and a single sprig of fresh sage-green eucalyptus draped across the lower-right corner. The center-right area beside the folded white towel is intentionally empty — clean wood surface with deliberate negative space, perfectly framed by the surrounding items. Soft natural daylight from the upper right of the frame, throwing long gentle diagonal shadows across the wood floor, warm wood tones, subtle warm glow across all surfaces. Shot on Sony A7IV 50mm lens directly overhead. Real photograph, not AI-generated, candid moment. Real surface texture and grain on the wood floor, prepared intentional gym-day lineup mood, palette of warm wood, cream towel, camel leather, brushed steel, sage-green eucalyptus. Minimalist editorial composition with deliberate emptiness at center-right.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI, person in frame, hands in frame, face in frame

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits horizontally at the center-right of the composition, front face up to the camera, slightly overlapping the corner of the folded white towel. Box is the visual hero of the arrangement.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box at the empty center-right area beside the folded white towel, oriented horizontally with its long side parallel to the lower edge of the frame, front face up to the camera, slightly overlapping the corner of the folded white towel so it reads as the visual hero of the lineup.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to avoid PuLID forcing any partial face/hand artifact into the empty center-right area where the product will be composited in Step 2.
